rationale: Review 2 correctly identifies that the two new imports in TauCeti.lean break the file's established alphabetical ordering — `TauCeti.NumberTheory.Multiquadratic.SquareClass` is placed before `TauCeti.FieldTheory.IntermediateField.Quadratic` (N before F) and before the existing `TauCeti.NumberTheory.EffectiveBounds.*` entries (Multiquadratic before EffectiveBounds) — a real, verifiable finding that a maintainer maintaining a sorted aggregator would want fixed; Review 1 misses this entirely.
